ToyopucDeviceClient(string, int, int, string, double, int, double, int, ToyopucAddressingOptions?, string?) 

public ToyopucDeviceClient(string host, int port, int localPort = 0, string protocol = "tcp", double timeout = 3, int retries = 0, double retryDelay = 0.2, int recvBufsize = 8192, ToyopucAddressingOptions? addressingOptions = null, string? deviceProfile = null)

localPort int
